name: DigiFinex Crypto Exchange API
what_it_does: Singapore-based cryptocurrency exchange with REST and WebSocket API — enabling traders and developers to access spot trading, perpetual futures, margin trading, market data, and account management, with HMAC-SHA256 authentication and a v3 REST API with both public and private endpoints.
use_cases: Accessing spot market data via DigiFinex API for real-time price feeds and order books
Executing trades via DigiFinex API for spot and perpetual futures algorithmic trading
Managing perpetual futures positions via DigiFinex API for leveraged trading strategies
Streaming market data via DigiFinex WebSocket for real-time trading applications
Fetching account balances via DigiFinex API for portfolio management automation
not_for: Top-tier liquidity requirements (use Binance/Coinbase for major pairs)
best_when: A developer needs a Singaporean exchange with perpetual futures and decent altcoin coverage as an alternative or complement to top-tier exchanges.
avoid_when: You need US compliance, top-tier liquidity, or comprehensive official SDK support.

auth.notes: HMAC-SHA256 signature. Parameters: AccessKey (API key), Sign (HMAC-SHA256 of sorted params + secret), timestamp. Signature is HMAC-SHA256 of URL-encoded query string (sorted alphabetically by param name) using secret key. Timestamp: Unix seconds (not milliseconds). REST API at openapi.digifinex.com/v3/. WebSocket: wss://openapi.digifinex.com/ws/v1/. API key access levels: read-only, trade, withdrawal (separate permissions).

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access free; spot trading: 0.2% standard maker/taker
pricing.paid_tiers: VIP tiers based on 30-day volume; DFT token for fee discounts
pricing.notes: Singaporean company. Founded 2017. ~400+ trading pairs. Products: Spot, Perpetual Futures, Margin, OTC. DFT token: native exchange token for fee discounts. API v3 (REST) with v1 WebSocket. Timestamp in UNIX seconds (not milliseconds — unusual). Parameter sorting: alphabetical for signature calculation. US-restricted. KYC required. Mid-tier exchange with moderate liquidity. API documentation in English and Chinese.

performance.rate_limits: 240 requests/minute per IP for market data; lower for private endpoints

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Timestamp in UNIX SECONDS (not milliseconds). Alphabetical param sorting for signature. AccessKey + Sign + timestamp params. Separate read/trade/withdrawal permissions. US-restricted. Singaporean company.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: GET requests idempotent. Order placement: use client_oid for idempotent order tracking. Market data reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Timestamp: UNIX seconds (NOT milliseconds) — common mistake when copying from other exchange integrations
HMAC signature: sort parameters alphabetically before signing — non-standard vs most exchanges
Three API key permission levels: read, trade, withdrawal — use minimum necessary permissions
WebSocket API version (v1) differs from REST API version (v3) — separate endpoints and protocols
US-restricted exchange — IP geoblocking may apply to US users
Parameter sorting for signature: URL-encode each value then sort by key alphabetically

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. HMAC-SHA256 with alphabetical parameter sorting. Three permission levels (read/trade/withdrawal) — good permission segmentation. UNIX seconds timestamp (smaller replay window concern vs milliseconds). Singaporean company: MAS regulatory environment. API key and secret require secure storage. No OAuth2. US-restricted.
